creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Looks like a conflict with some headers installed on your system. Try to 
clean out /usr/local/include and /usr/X11R6/include (deinstall all installed 
packages, remove what is left in /usr/local/include and /usr/X11R6/include) 
and try to build Mozilla again. Also considering downloading and using 
pre-built FreeBSD package instead.
